# Eclipse Dev Commands

Operator reference for `/dev` and legacy admin roots. Regenerate with `/dev docs export`.

## Config & handbook


## Legacy `/eclipse` and reference roots

Permission level **3** unless noted. Prefer polished `/dev` equivalents when available.

- `/eclipse altar set <level>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.altar.set · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse ban <player>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.ban · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse cutscene list` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.cutscene.list · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse day goals` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.day.goals · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse day set <day>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.day.set · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse event set <event>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.event.set · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse goals edit` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.goals.edit · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse lives set <player> <lives>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.lives.set · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse reload` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.reload · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse restore <player> [index]` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.restore · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse revive <player>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.revive · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse schedule clear` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.schedule.clear · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse schedule list` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.schedule.list · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse stage get` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.stage.get · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse stage load <n>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.stage.load · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse stage revert` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.stage.revert · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse stage save <n>` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.stage.save · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse stage status` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.stage.status · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse start_event` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.start_event · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse status` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.status · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse supply drop` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.supply.drop · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse timeline` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.timeline · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse tp_limbo [player]` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse.tp_limbo · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse-buffs …` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse_buffs.root · perm **3** · *legacy*
- `/eclipse-quests …` — dev.eclipse.doc.eclipse_quests.root · perm **3** · *legacy*

## Dev blocks & items

- **Display Wand** — `/dev display give` (P5-W6). Vanilla `block_display` placer; Axiom is not available for NeoForge 1.21.1; wand + commands are the supported editor.
